calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant Dong Fu appeared in Propria Persona
Daniel Piccinini, Esq., (415) 345-8610, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Mei Yin Fong
RULING:
A R G U E D; Proof of Service is defective. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT DONG FU'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. Order signed. (301/JLW/ds) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jan-10-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dong Fu, Defendant Propria Persona
Daniel Piccinini, Esq. (415) 345-8610 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Fong
RULING:
Plaintiff's Counsel had no knowledge of today's hearing. DEFENDANT DONG FU'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: DENIED; service was improper. Defendant has 5 days leave to file his answer from notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
